name: Merchants & Farmers Bank of Greene County, Alabama
description_short: Community bank serving Central Alabama since 1900 with branches in Eutaw, Prattville, and Demopolis. Offers personal and business banking with online and mobile services.
description_long: Merchants & Farmers Bank of Greene County, Alabama has been operating since 1900, making it a century-old community financial institution rooted in Central Alabama. The bank maintains three physical locations: Eutaw (headquarters at 302 Prairie Ave), Prattville (1805 E. Main St), and a Loan Production Office in Demopolis (205 E. Washington St). The bank emphasizes its deep commitment to serving neighbors and communities through diversified financial services. The bank offers comprehensive personal and business banking products. On the personal side, customers can access deposit accounts with online and mobile banking capabilities, loan products, and payment services including Zelle integration. Business customers have access to business checking and loan products. The bank provides multiple payment options: fee-free ACH payments and debit card payments (with a $5.95 processing fee). Online banking is described as secure with monitoring and active security measures. Merchants & Farmers Bank distinguishes itself through its long-standing community presence and local focus, having served the region for over 120 years. The bank has invested in modern technology, including a newly released mobile app (MFBUSAMOBILE) available on iOS and Android, mobile web banking, and text message banking services. All mobile and online banking services are offered free to customers with online banking accounts. The institution emphasizes accessibility, offering multiple contact channels and branch locations across Alabama. The bank operates as a traditional community bank with modest technology adoption relative to larger institutions. While it offers modern digital banking tools, the website does not provide detailed information about specific loan products, interest rates, fees beyond the debit card payment fee, or comprehensive product details. The three-location footprint limits accessibility for customers outside the immediate service areas, and there is no indication of nationwide or online-only account opening capabilities.
services: Online banking with secure credential access
Mobile banking via MFBUSAMOBILE app (iOS and Android)
Mobile web banking through browser access
Financial calculators for mortgages and savings
Multiple physical branch locations with ATMs
pros: Fee-free ACH payments with no charges assessed by the bank itself
Newly released mobile app (MFBUSAMOBILE) available on iOS and Android with no subscription fees
Free mobile banking services including app, mobile web, and text message banking
Over 120 years of community banking history since 1900, establishing deep local roots
Multiple account access methods: online banking, mobile app, mobile web, and text message banking
Secure online banking with active monitoring and security measures
Zelle integration for faster peer-to-peer payments mentioned on website
Multiple branch locations and ATMs across Alabama for in-person service
cons: $5.95 debit card payment processing fee (compared to free ACH option)
Limited physical footprint with only 3 locations in Central Alabama, restricting accessibility for customers outside service areas
No online account opening option mentioned; appears to require in-person visits at branches
Minimal product detail on website regarding specific loan terms, rates, fees, or product offerings beyond general categories
No indication of 24/7 customer support; contact methods appear limited to branch phone numbers
best_for: Central Alabama residents and businesses near Eutaw, Prattville, or Demopolis seeking local banking relationships
Customers who value long-established community banks with physical branch presence
Individuals and businesses wanting fee-free ACH payment processing
Tech-comfortable users seeking mobile-first banking with app and web access
diagnosis: Merchants & Farmers Bank is best for Central Alabama residents and businesses seeking traditional community banking with modern digital access and long-standing local relationships. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank's three locations serve only a specific Alabama region, making it inaccessible for customers outside the Eutaw, Prattville, and Demopolis areas.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank serving Central Alabama since 1900 with branches in Eutaw, Prattville, and Demopolis, offering personal and business banking.
fdic_official_name: Merchants & Farmers Bank of Greene County, Alabama
